issue_summary: Uniform handling of special tar records in `TarFile` and `TarArchiveInputStream`
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Gets the next TarArchiveEntry in this stream.
     *
     * @return the next entry, or {@code null} if there are no more entries
     * @throws IOException if the next entry could not be read
     */
javadoc_after:
/** * Advances to the next file entry in the tar archive. *

* Skips any remaining data in the current entry, then reads and returns the next file entry. * Handles special records (PAX, GNU long name, sparse, etc.) and applies PAX headers as needed. *

* * @return the next file entry, or {@code null} if there are no more entries * @throws IOException if the next entry could not be read or the archive is malformed */
